title: trident are weapon
description: Simple mod to make trident enchantable by damage enchantments and looting
body:
This is a simple mod to make Trident not just movement utility.

Now u can enchant trident with sharpness, smite, bane of spiders and looting!

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9ceb9003ae6ea60f720cea89b15c878f4ec698d.png)![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9ceb9003ae6ea60f720cea89b15c878f4ec698d.png)![trident with enchantments](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9ceb9003ae6ea60f720cea89b15c878f4ec698d.png)
